name: restos-desktop
description: RestOS v4 Desktop — POS система для ресторанов (Go-бэк + embedded Postgres)

scripts.build-frontend: cd .. && npx vite build && rm -rf desktop/frontend && cp -r dist desktop/frontend
scripts.build-sidecar-win: cd ../server && GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -trimpath -o bin/restos-server-windows-amd64.exe ./cmd/restos-server && cp bin/restos-server-windows-amd64.exe ../desktop/resources/restos-server.exe
scripts.build-sidecar-mac: cd ../server && go build -trimpath -o bin/restos-server ./cmd/restos-server && cp bin/restos-server ../desktop/resources/restos-server
scripts.dist:win: npm run build-frontend && npm run build-sidecar-win && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build-frontend && npm run build-sidecar-mac && electron-builder --mac
